title: rosa × dumetorum subsp. deseglisei
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subsp. deseglisei is a subspecies of rose that is native to the Mediterranean region, specifically found in the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Rosa × dumetorum subsp. deseglisei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
